scripts.lint: sh -n gate-pack/run.sh && sh -n gate-pack/verify.sh && python3 -B -c "import pathlib; files=sorted([*pathlib.Path('gate-pack').rglob('*.py'), *pathlib.Path('lh_runtime').rglob('*.py')]); [compile(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'), str(path), 'exec') for path in files]; print(f'lint: PASS ({len(files)} Python files)')"
